svg.title: Meta-network of residual streams over a shared-memory bus
svg.desc: Four transformer residual streams (vertical rivers of light), labeled agent N through agent N+3, interact across a horizontal shared-memory bus that abstractly represents the outside world. The picture is a window into a longer chain (ellipses on either side suggest more agents). Every cross-agent influence requires decoding; what differs is what the decoded output does next. The direct lane (amber) carries a decoded response that is fed verbatim as the next agent's input. The indirect lane (violet) carries a decoded tool-call that mutates a shared state pocket on the bus, which a later agent then reads as input.

g.text: direct: response is next agent's input
